name: Jaguar Health, Inc.
business: Jaguar Health, in conjunction with Jaguar family company Napo Pharmaceuticals, develops novel proprietary prescription drugs sustainably derived from plants for people with complicated gastrointestinal disease states.

exposures.sentence: Jaguar Health, in conjunction with Jaguar family company Napo Pharmaceuticals, develops novel proprietary prescription drugs sustainably derived from plants for people with complicated gastrointestinal disease states.
In December 2021, the Company received conditional approval from the FDA to market Canalevia-CA1 (crofelemer delayed-release tablets) for the treatment of chemotherapy-induced diarrhea (CID) in dogs.
Magdalena Biosciences, a joint venture formed by Jaguar and Filament Health Corp., is focused on developing novel prescription medicines derived from plants for mental health indications.

catalysts.event: Submit final clinical study report and responder analysis for OnTarget trial to FDA
catalysts.sentence: In the second half of 2026, based on discussions with the FDA in May 2025, the company plans to submit to the FDA the final clinical study report (CSR) for the OnTarget trial together with additional details of the responder analysis in the cohort of breast cancer patients, along with a patient survey evaluating clinically meaningful reductions in the frequency of weekly loose/watery stools for patients metastatic cancer patients receiving targeted therapies with or without standard chemotherapy.

tamClaims.claim: US market revenue potential for Mytesi approximately $50 million in gross annual sales
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate the US market revenue potential for Mytesi to be approximately $50 million in gross annual sales.

tamClaims.claim: Estimated 650,000 US cancer patients receive chemotherapy in outpatient oncology clinic
tamClaims.sentence: An estimated 650,000 US cancer patients receive chemotherapy in an outpatient oncology clinic (2).

tamClaims.claim: Global SBS market exceeded $568 million in 2019, expected to reach $4.6 billion by 2027
tamClaims.sentence: The global SBS market exceeded $568 million in 2019 and is expected to reach $4.6 billion by 2027, according to a report by Vision Research Reports (5).

tamClaims.claim: Most IBS products have estimated revenue potential greater than $1.0 billion
tamClaims.sentence: Most IBS products have an estimated revenue potential of greater than $1.0 billion (6).

tamClaims.claim: Priority review vouchers have sold for $67 million to $350 million
tamClaims.sentence: In transactions by other companies, priority review vouchers have sold for $67 million to $350 million (7).
